mapper.select:
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS batchFlag FROM CMN_BATCH_EXEC_HST WHERE BATCH_JOB_ID = (SELECT BATCH_JOB_ID FROM CMN_BATCH_INFO WHERE EXEC_SERVICE = #{execService}) AND SUBSTR(STRT_DTTM, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
AND STAT_CD IN ( 'ING' , 'END' )

SELECT COUNT(*) AS endCount FROM CMN_BATCH_EXEC_HST WHERE BATCH_JOB_ID = #{batchJobId} AND EXEC_TYPE_CD = 'SCHE' AND STRT_DTTM BETWEEN #{batchDate} || '000000' AND #{batchDate} || '235959' AND STAT_CD = 'END'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS ingCount FROM CMN_BATCH_EXEC_HST WHERE BATCH_JOB_ID = #{batchJobId} AND BATCH_EXEC_ID != #{batchExecId} AND EXEC_TYPE_CD = 'SCHE' AND STRT_DTTM BETWEEN #{batchDate} || '000000' AND #{batchDate} || '235959' AND STAT_CD = 'ING'
